full_text:
Guo Xian (Youjian)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Xian, styledYoujian, was born in Jincheng. Refused provincial office, admired for his generosity. Shielded Han Sui from those that wished him harm. Guo Xian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, the Han Sui Dynasty, and the Wei Kingdom. Guo Xian lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
